creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Legend has it that gnomes live here! 🧚🏻‍♀️ 

Bok Tower Gardens 
1151 Tower Blvd. 
Lake Wales, FL

#thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #boktowergardens #botanicalgardensflorida

transcription.text: Fairytale Places in Florida, Part 5. If you've been looking for the real-life Rapunzel's Tower, I found it for you right here in Florida. Located in Lake Wales lies this magical place called Bock Tower Gardens and legend has it that gnomes live here. The centerpiece of this gardens is this stunning singing tower that plays music every 30 minutes. This tower is perched atop Iron Mountain, which is the highest point in Florida. Be sure to bring some quarters so you can feed the fish in the reflection pool, which has these lily pads big enough for a person to lie on. Also on the property is El Retiro, which is a 1930s historic mansion you can walk around and it's absolutely gorgeous. There's also a fairy garden playground for kids to play in and they were having so much fun. I loved wandering around all these gardens and finding so many hidden off the beaten paths to explore. I was hoping to see a gnome, but I didn't. Maybe next time. Save this post and send it to a friend who loves fairy tale places and follow for more great Florida content from a local.
